sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: Cloudflare 2026년 1분기 매출 34% 성장, 에이전트 AI 퍼스트 전환 선언과 인력 감축 계획 발표

keyPoints.text: 1분기 총매출이 6억 3,980만 달러로 전년 동기 대비 34% 증가했습니다.
Current RPO가 전년 동기 대비 34% 성장했습니다.
에이전트 AI 퍼스트 운영 모델로의 전환을 위해 현재 인력의 약 20%를 감축하는 계획을 발표하고, 관련 비용으로 1억 4,000만~1억 5,000만 달러가 발생할 것으로 추정했습니다.

riskChanges.text: 인력 감축에 따른 구조조정 비용 1억 4,000만~1억 5,000만 달러가 단기 수익성에 부담으로 작용할 수 있으며, 실제 비용은 초기 추정치와 달라질 수 있다고 회사가 명시했습니다.

businessChanges.text: AI와 에이전트가 핵심 인력으로 자리 잡으며 업무 방식이 근본적으로 변화했다고 경영진이 밝혔습니다.
에이전트 AI 퍼스트 운영 모델을 공식 채택하며 조직 설계를 의도적으로 재구성하겠다고 선언했습니다.
인력 약 20% 감축 계획의 현금 지출은 주로 통지 기간, 퇴직금, 직원 복리후생으로 구성되며 1억 500만~1억 1,000만 달러, 비현금 비용은 3,500만~4,000만 달러로 추정됩니다.

financialHighlights.text: 비GAAP 영업이익이 7,310만 달러(매출의 11.4%)로, 전년 동기 5,600만 달러(11.7%)에서 증가했습니다.
GAAP 영업손실은 6,200만 달러(매출의 9.7%)로, 전년 동기 5,320만 달러(11.1%)에서 소폭 확대됐습니다.
현금·현금성 자산 및 매도가능증권은 2026년 3월 31일 기준 41억 6,390만 달러였습니다.
GAAP 순손실은 2,290만 달러로 전년 동기 3,850만 달러에서 개선됐습니다.

watchItems.text: 구조조정 완료 후 에이전트 AI 퍼스트 운영 모델이 실질적인 비용 효율 및 성장 가속으로 이어지는지 확인이 필요합니다.
34% 매출 성장세와 Current RPO 34% 성장 유지가 향후 분기에도 지속될지 주목됩니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 q126exhibit991.htm EX-99.1 Document Cloudflare Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results • First quarter revenue totaled $639.8 million, representing an increase of 34% year-over-year • GAAP loss from operations of $62.0 million, or 10% of total revenue, and non-GAAP income from operations of $73.1 million, or 11% of revenue • Delivered Current RPO year-over-year growth of 34% San Francisco, CA, May 7, 2026 — Cloudflare, Inc. (NYSE: NET), the leading connectivity cloud company, today announced financial results for its first quarter ended March 31, 2026. “We had a very strong start to 2026. AI is driving a fundamental re-platforming of the Internet and a paradigm shift in how software is created and consumed; it's shaping up to be the biggest tailwind we’ve ever seen in Cloudflare’s history,” said Matthew  Normalized numeric aliases: $639.8 million = 6억 3,980만 달러; $62.0 million = 6,200만 달러; $73.1 million = 7,310만 달러; $639.8 = 639.8달러; $62.0 = 62.0달러; $73.1 = 73.1달러.

build and sell AI tools and platforms, we're our own most demanding customer. With AI and agents now core parts of our workforce, the way we work at Cloudflare has fundamentally changed. As a result, we're being intentional in how we architect our company to supercharge the value we deliver to our customers. By embracing an agentic AI-first operating model, Cloudflare will be even faster and more innovative as we continue to help build a better Internet.” First Quarter Fiscal 2026 Financial Highlights • Revenue : Total revenue of $639.8 million, representing an increase of 34% year-over-year. • Gross Profit : GAAP gross profit was $455.6 million, or 71.2% gross margin, compared to $363.5 million, or 75.9%, in the  Normalized numeric aliases: $639.8 million = 6억 3,980만 달러; $455.6 million = 4억 5,560만 달러; $363.5 million = 3억 6,350만 달러; $465.7 million = 4억 6,570만 달러; $369.3 million = 3억 6,930만 달러; $639.8 = 639.8달러; $455.6 = 455.6달러; $363.5 = 363.5달러; $369.3 = 369.3달러; $465.7 = 465.7달러.

: GAAP loss from operations was $62.0 million, or 9.7% of revenue, compared to $53.2 million, or 11.1% of revenue, in the first quarter of 2025. Non-GAAP income from operations was $73.1 million, or 11.4% of revenue, compared to $56.0 million, or 11.7% of revenue, in the first quarter of 2025. • Net Income (Loss) : GAAP net loss was $22.9 million, compared to $38.5 million in the first quarter of 2025. GAAP net loss per basic and diluted share was $0.07, compared to $0.11 in the first quarter of 2025. Non-GAAP net income was $94.0 million, compared to $58.4 million in the first quarter  Normalized numeric aliases: $62.0 million = 6,200만 달러; $53.2 million = 5,320만 달러; $73.1 million = 7,310만 달러; $56.0 million = 5,600만 달러; $22.9 million = 2,290만 달러; $38.5 million = 3,850만 달러; $94.0 million = 9,400만 달러; $58.4 million = 5,840만 달러; $145.8 million = 1억 4,580만 달러; $56.0 = 56.0달러; $94.0 = 94.0달러; $145.8 = 145.8달러; $58.4 = 58.4달러; $0.25 = 0.25달러; $0.16 = 0.16달러; $158.3 = 158.3달러; $84.1 = 84.1달러.

$52.9 million, or 11% of revenue, in the first quarter of 2025. • Cash, cash equivalents, and available-for-sale securities were $4,163.9 million as of March 31, 2026. The section titled "Non-GAAP Financial Information" below describes our usage of non-GAAP financial measures. Reconciliations between historical GAAP and non-GAAP information are contained at the end of this press release following the accompanying financial data. Operating Model Evolution This afternoon, we announced actions designed to further accelerate Cloudflare’s evolution to an agentic AI-first operating model. A letter from our founders can be viewed at https://blog.cloudflare.com/building-for-the-future/. As part of the plan, we expect to reduce our current workforce  Normalized numeric aliases: $52.9 million = 5,290만 달러; $4,163.9 million = 41억 6,390만 달러; $150.0 million = 1억 5,000만 달러; $52.9 = 52.9달러; $4,163.9 = 4,163.9달러; $140.0 = 140.0달러; $150.0 = 150.0달러; 4,163 million = 41억 6,300만 달러; 1,100 million = 11억 달러.

On May 7, 2026, the Company announced a plan (the “Plan”) designed to further accelerate its evolution to an agentic AI-first operating model. As part of the Plan, the Company expects to reduce its current workforce by approximately 20%. The Company currently estimates that it will incur charges of between $140 million and $150 million in connection with the Plan, consisting primarily of cash expenditures for notice periods, severance payments, employee benefits and related costs of between $105 million and $110 million and non-cash expenses related to vesting of share-based awards of between $35 million and $40 million. The Company expects that the majority of the restructuring charges will be incurred in the second  Normalized numeric aliases: $140 million = 1억 4,000만 달러; $150 million = 1억 5,000만 달러; $105 million = 1억 500만 달러; $110 million = 1억 1,000만 달러; $35 million = 3,500만 달러; $40 million = 4,000만 달러; $140 = 140달러; $150 = 150달러; $110 = 110달러; $105 = 105달러; $35 = 35달러; $40 = 40달러.
